TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Haga paris knhulan na ita Tayal hiya ga kahul ta bih na Pinsbkan, ro hkngyan skura te tltuw, karow ro krayas rgyax "b'bu bayu" kwara. ryax haca ga knaki bih alang lela kwara cyoli na llyung Klesan, ro mpuw payat kwara alang cnrux kya. laney ta skal cikey cyu inu alang Tayal kwara bih llyung Klesan kya. alang Haga paris ga nya maki skura te tltuw llyung Turu, b'nux alang haca ro nya sobih te iyil na gong Bsyowan, skura alang Ryohen kya ha'iy uy, miman pitu koro theya' nya, yow na cinlalu alang na Haga paris ga phaga btunux yow nmya ma.
S.PHON: alaŋ ħaɣa paris~ɕ knħulan na ita tajal ħija ɣa kaħul ta βiħ na pins~ɕβkan, ro ħkŋjan s~ɕkura te tltuw, karow ro krajas~ɕ rɣjax "βʔβu βaju" kwara. rjax ħaʦ~ʨa ɣa knaki βiħ alaŋ lela kwara ʦ~ʨjoli na lljuŋ kles~ɕan, ro mpuw pajat kwara alaŋ ʦ~ʨnrux kja. lanej ta s~ɕkal ʦ~ʨikej ʦ~ʨju inu alaŋ tajal kwara βiħ lljuŋ kles~ɕan kja. alaŋ ħaɣa paris~ɕ ɣa nja maki s~ɕkura te tltuw lljuŋ turu, βʔnux alaŋ ħaʦ~ʨa ro nja s~ɕoβiħ te ijil na ɣoŋ βs~ɕjowan, s~ɕkura alaŋ rjoħen kja ħaʔij uj, miman pitu koro tħejaʔ nja, jow na ʦ~ʨinlalu alaŋ na ħaɣa paris~ɕ ɣa pħaɣa βtunux jow nmja ma.
S.FORM: alang Haga paris knhulan na ita Tayal hiya ga kahul ta bih na Pinsbkan, ro hkngyan skura te tltuw, karow ro krayas rgyax "b'bu bayu" kwara. ryax haca ga knaki bih alang lela kwara cyoli na llyung Klesan, ro mpuw payat kwara alang cnrux kya. laney ta skal cikey cyu inu alang Tayal kwara bih llyung Klesan kya. alang Haga paris ga nya maki skura te tltuw llyung Turu, b'nux alang haca ro nya sobih te iyil na gong Bsyowan, skura alang Ryohen kya ha'iy uy, miman pitu koro theya' nya, yow na cinlalu alang na Haga paris ga phaga btunux yow nmya ma.
S.PHON: alaŋ ħaɣa paris~ɕ knħulan na ita tajal ħija ɣa kaħul ta βiħ na pins~ɕβkan, ro ħkŋjan s~ɕkura te tltuw, karow ro krajas~ɕ rɣjax "βʔβu βaju" kwara. rjax ħaʦ~ʨa ɣa knaki βiħ alaŋ lela kwara ʦ~ʨjoli na lljuŋ kles~ɕan, ro mpuw pajat kwara alaŋ ʦ~ʨnrux kja. lanej ta s~ɕkal ʦ~ʨikej ʦ~ʨju inu alaŋ tajal kwara βiħ lljuŋ kles~ɕan kja. alaŋ ħaɣa paris~ɕ ɣa nja maki s~ɕkura te tltuw lljuŋ turu, βʔnux alaŋ ħaʦ~ʨa ro nja s~ɕoβiħ te ijil na ɣoŋ βs~ɕjowan, s~ɕkura alaŋ rjoħen kja ħaʔij uj, miman pitu koro tħejaʔ nja, jow na ʦ~ʨinlalu alaŋ na ħaɣa paris~ɕ ɣa pħaɣa βtunux jow nmja ma.
